name: Distributor-and-Agent-Enquiries-V1.docx
content:
Does C.E. King have distributors or agents in my country?

C.E. King primarily sells direct from the United Kingdom to customers worldwide. The company does not currently maintain a large network of distributors, but may have local contacts in some regions. For any local representation queries, contact the sales team.

Details

  • C.E. King sells direct to customers in over 80 countries from the UK
  • Direct sales means you deal with the manufacturer — no middleman markup
  • For some regions, C.E. King may be able to recommend a local service partner or agent
  • If you are interested in becoming a distributor or agent for C.E. King equipment, email sales@ceking.com with your company details, territory, and relevant experience
  • Spare parts can be ordered directly from king.parts and shipped internationally
  • Technical support is provided directly by the C.E. King team in the UK via email and phone
  • For customers in the United States: there is no US warehouse or US distributor — all equipment ships direct from the UK
  • For customers requiring local installation support, the sales team can advise on options available in your region
  • Language: the team primarily communicates in English, but can accommodate enquiries in other languages where possible

Useful link:

Contact C.E. King Sales
